message:
feat(dolt): fail-fast TCP check before MySQL protocol initialization

When dolt_mode=server, bd now does a quick TCP dial (500ms timeout)
before attempting MySQL driver initialization. This gives an immediate,
clear error if the Dolt server is not running, instead of waiting for
longer MySQL driver timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ import (
 	"database/sql"
 	"errors"
 	"fmt"
+	"net"
 	"os"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"strings"
@@ -166,6 +167,17 @@ func New(ctx context.Context, cfg *Config) (*DoltStore, error) {
 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get absolute path: %w", err)
 	}
 
+	// Fail-fast TCP check before MySQL protocol initialization.
+	// This gives an immediate, clear error if the Dolt server isn't running,
+	// rather than waiting for MySQL driver timeouts.
+	addr := net.JoinHostPort(cfg.ServerHost, fmt.Sprintf("%d", cfg.ServerPort))
+	conn, err := net.DialTimeout("tcp", addr, 500*time.Millisecond)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, fmt.Errorf("Dolt server unreachable at %s: %w\n\nThe Dolt server may not be running. Try:\n  gt dolt start    # If using Gas Town\n  dolt sql-server  # Manual start in database directory",
+			addr, err)
+	}
+	_ = conn.Close()
+
 	// Connect to dolt sql-server via MySQL protocol
 	db, connStr, err := openServerConnection(ctx, cfg)
 	if err != nil {
